core_mechanism: fixing a system's admissible transformation (symmetry) group by imposing invariance postulates (homogeneity and isotropy), which selects a Lie group carrying two invariant scale constants and reduces to a simpler limiting group when one scale is sent to a degenerate value (a group-deformation/contraction construction)
brief_reason: The abstract derives the kinematical group from the postulated symmetries of spacetime homogeneity and spatial isotropy, obtaining the Lie group SO(1,4) parametrized by two universal constants that in a limiting situation reduces to the ordinary case.
